title: Purely Velvety Croatian Chicken Skewers
description: A Whole30-friendly Croatian dish featuring Thai sweet basil, sous-vide cooked to perfection, served on a tagliere for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 140 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in the sous-vide machine and cook for 2 hours.
After 2 hours, remove the skewers from the sous-vide machine and sprinkle with chopped Thai sweet basil.
Serve the chicken skewers on a tagliere with your choice of sides.
Garnish with additional Thai sweet basil if desired.
